description_for_human: Visual neural network builder with drag-and-drop interface. Build, train, and export PyTorch models.
description_for_model: NeuralFlows is a web application for building neural networks visually. Users can drag and drop layers to create architectures, train models in-browser using TensorFlow.js, and export production-ready PyTorch code. The application supports various layer types including Dense, Conv2D, MaxPool2D, LSTM, GRU, MultiHeadAttention, TransformerEncoder, TransformerDecoder, BatchNorm, LayerNorm, Dropout, Embedding, Flatten, and Output layers. Pre-built templates are available for common architectures: Simple MLP (for tabular data), CNN (for image classification), RNN/LSTM (for sequences), Transformer (for NLP), and Autoencoder (for dimensionality reduction). Users can configure input shapes for different data types: Flat vectors, Images (channels, height, width), and Sequences (length, features). The builder includes a learning panel that provides educational content about each layer type.
